100: 〉 Beyond the door, you find a 
young man surrounded by enemies.
[->]〉 It seems he is one of the others
who found their way here.
[END]
101: (Flynn) [7a 379]You're... It's dangerous here! 
Get back!
[END]
102: 〉 Flynn glances to you while he 
fights.
[->]〉 Will you help Flynn?
[END]
103: Help him
Hang back and watch
A〉選択肢01_A加勢する
A〉選択肢01_Bもう少し様子を見る
[END]
104: 〉 You leap into the fray and cut down
one of the enemies.
[END]
105: (Flynn) [7a 379]You can fight!?
[END]
106: 〉 Flynn nods at you.
[END]
107: (Flynn) [7a 379]Please, lend me a hand. I need your 
strength to defeat these enemies!
[END]
108: 〉 You decide to hang back and watch.
[END]
109: (Flynn) [7a 379]Yes, please−−just stay there.
[END]
110: 〉 Flynn gracefully dispatches the
remainder of the enemies in one swing.
[->]〉 It doesn't really seem like he
needs your help.
[END]
111: 〉 Suddenly, a horde of enemies 
surrounds you and attacks!
[END]
112: 〉 Flynn bravely charges back into
the mass of enemies.
[->]〉 You ready your weapon and face
another group of enemies.
[END]
200: (Flynn) [7a 187]You're amazing...
[END]
201: 〉 Flynn, having finished off his own
enemies, walks over to you.
[END]
202: (Flynn) [7a 187]It seems you know more about this place 
than I.
[->]If you don't mind, could you tell me 
what you know?
[END]
203: 〉 You explain the situation to Flynn.
[END]
204: (Flynn) [7a 187]I see... I think I understand. 
I shall speak with En no Ozuno.
[->]I'll go on ahead. Let's meet again 
later.
[END]
205: 〉 Flynn walks off.
[END]
1000: 〉 The room is silent.
[END]
